description: Boot sequence skipped Plaud pull (again — same as err-20260326-003), delivered a skeletal briefing without calendar, OmniFocus, or transcript processing. When corrected, re-fetched transcripts that were already processed into Obsidian. When David said 'they're already in Obsidian', searched Obsidian to verify instead of trusting him and just cleaning staging. Three corrections required before Jarvis caught the actual actionable item: LiftNet follow-up call scheduled today at 2:30 PM with Don, directly tied to action items from the Mar 25 transcript.
correction: Boot means full chief-morning workflow. When David says something is done, trust him and move on. Surface action items from recent transcripts that hit today's calendar — that's the whole point of the Plaud pull.
systemic_fix: This is the second consecutive session with a truncated boot (err-20260326-003). The boot sequence is non-negotiable: identity files → full chief-morning workflow (calendar + OmniFocus + Plaud + reMarkable + lead review in parallel). Also: when David corrects a factual claim, act on it immediately — don't verify what he just told you.
